use_cases: Display FAQ content with expandable/collapsible answers
Organize Q&A sections on help or support pages
Create FAQ pages for product documentation
Build knowledge base interfaces with categorized content
Implement support or contact sections with common questions
ai_summary: A clean, accessible FAQ accordion component built with Radix UI primitives and Lucide icons. Features smooth expand/collapse animations with rotating chevron indicators, hover states, and full keyboard navigation support. Minimal styling using Tailwind CSS makes it easily customizable for any design system.
